coding.display: Transbronchial needle aspiration of mediastinal lymph node using endoscopic endobronchial ultrasonography guidance (procedure)

location.display: The University of Texas MD Anderson Cancer Center

bodySite.text: Mediastinal lymph node station 4R (right lower paratracheal)

note.text: Flexible bronchoscope with integrated ultrasound transducer, oral approach, 22-gauge aspiration needle under real-time EBUS visualization. 3 passes at station 4R, 3 passes at station 7. Rapid on-site cytology evaluation (ROSE) confirmed adequate tissue at both sites. Moderate sedation per institutional protocol. Estimated blood loss: minimal.
